name: libexporter-tiny-perl
title: libexporter-tiny-perl
description:
tiny exporter similar to Sub::Exporter
Exporter::Tiny is an exporter for Perl with the features of
Sub::Exporter but only core dependencies.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libexporter-tiny-perl because tiny exporter similar to Sub::Exporter.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libexporter-tiny-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libexporter-tiny-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libexporter-tiny-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
